skills.name: Agent Regression Pack Generator
skills.shortDescription: Builds and validates regression case packs for agent behavior changes.
skills.longDescription: Generates structured evaluation cases for changed agent workflows and validates pack completeness for repeatable regression testing.
skills.author: ARS AI

inputs.name: change_summary
inputs.description: Summary of behavior changes in agent workflow/prompt/tooling.

outputs.name: regression_pack
outputs.description: Structured test case pack ready for execution.

outputs.name: evaluation_plan
outputs.description: Execution strategy and pass/fail rules.

includedAssets.name: scripts/validate_regression_pack.py
includedAssets.description: Validates regression pack case schema and required fields.

includedAssets.name: references/case-schema.md
includedAssets.description: Regression case schema specification.

includedAssets.name: references/coverage-mapping-guide.md
includedAssets.description: Guide for mapping risk areas to regression case coverage.

failureModes: Case packs may miss semantic edge conditions.
Risk-area mapping can be incomplete.
Pass criteria may be vague without explicit assertions.

examples.title: Tool-calling behavior update
examples.summary: Generates and validates regression cases for updated tool routing logic.
examples.outputPreview: Validated regression pack with uncovered risk notes

changelog.summary: Initial release for agent regression pack generation.

skills.name: API Contract Diff Checker
skills.shortDescription: Flags backward-incompatible API contract changes before merge.
skills.longDescription: Compares old/new API specifications and produces deterministic breaking-change reports suitable for CI and release gates.
skills.author: ARS API

outputs.name: contract_diff_report
outputs.description: Human-readable summary of contract changes.

outputs.name: breaking_changes
outputs.description: Machine-readable breaking change list.

includedAssets.name: scripts/compare_openapi.py
includedAssets.description: Compares OpenAPI path/method surfaces and flags deterministic breaking changes.

includedAssets.name: references/breaking-change-rules.md
includedAssets.description: Ruleset for classifying contract diffs as breaking or non-breaking.

includedAssets.name: references/versioning-guidance.md
includedAssets.description: Version bump guidance for breaking API revisions.

failureModes: Spec drift from runtime behavior can hide real breakage.
Complex schema changes may require manual semantic review.
Policy exceptions can reduce reliability if overused.

examples.title: User endpoint contract update
examples.summary: Detects deleted method and required request field addition.
examples.outputPreview: 2 breaking changes and version bump recommendation

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic API compatibility diffing.

skills.name: Debug Incident Triage
skills.shortDescription: Clusters incident signals into ranked, testable hypotheses.
skills.longDescription: Structures incident debugging by grouping recurring log signatures and producing prioritized next-step diagnostics for on-call teams.
skills.author: ARS SRE

inputs.name: incident_logs
inputs.description: Error and warning events collected during incident window.

outputs.name: triage_report
outputs.description: Ranked hypotheses with evidence and confidence.

outputs.name: next_checks
outputs.description: Ordered diagnostic checks with command-level specificity.

includedAssets.name: scripts/cluster_log_signatures.py
includedAssets.description: Groups recurring error signatures by normalized log message.

includedAssets.name: references/triage-template.md
includedAssets.description: Template for consistent incident triage reports.

includedAssets.name: references/hypothesis-ranking.md
includedAssets.description: Confidence ranking guidance for triage hypotheses.

includedAssets.name: references/containment-playbook.md
includedAssets.description: Safe immediate containment action patterns.

failureModes: Insufficient telemetry leads to incorrect hypotheses.
Clustered messages may merge distinct root causes.
Human triage quality varies under incident pressure.

examples.title: Checkout API timeout incident
examples.summary: Clusters timeout and DB connection errors into prioritized hypotheses.
examples.outputPreview: Top hypothesis: DB pool exhaustion after rollout

changelog.summary: Initial release for incident triage workflow.

skills.name: Dependency Upgrade Risk Review
skills.shortDescription: Classifies dependency upgrade risk and recommends regression focus areas.
skills.longDescription: Analyzes version-change diffs and provides deterministic risk classification plus test focus guidance for safer upgrades.

outputs.name: upgrade_risk_report

outputs.name: test_focus_plan

includedAssets.name: scripts/dependency_diff_risk.py
includedAssets.description: Classifies risk by semantic version delta between manifests.

includedAssets.name: references/risk-matrix.md
includedAssets.description: Dependency upgrade risk matrix and escalation criteria.

includedAssets.name: references/test-focus-template.md
includedAssets.description: Template for targeted regression planning after upgrades.

failureModes: Semver can misrepresent true behavior changes.
Transitive dependency shifts may be underreported.
Missing changelog context weakens triage quality.

skills.name: ETL Reconciliation Check
skills.shortDescription: Detects ETL drift using row-count and checksum reconciliation.
skills.longDescription: Compares source and target ETL summaries with deterministic checks to catch data-loss and transformation drift before release.
skills.author: ARS Data

inputs.name: source_summary
inputs.description: Source dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

inputs.name: target_summary
inputs.description: Target dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

outputs.name: reconciliation_report
outputs.description: Deterministic report of count and checksum mismatches.

includedAssets.name: scripts/reconcile_summaries.py
includedAssets.description: Compares source and target summary JSON metrics.

includedAssets.name: references/reconciliation-policy.md
includedAssets.description: Policy thresholds and blocking criteria for reconciliation checks.

includedAssets.name: references/window-alignment-guide.md
includedAssets.description: Guide to prevent false mismatches from window skew.

includedAssets.name: references/mismatch-triage-playbook.md
includedAssets.description: Step-by-step triage flow for reconciliation mismatches.

failureModes: Summary files exclude key business dimensions.
Tolerance configuration is too permissive.
Mismatch triage is delayed and blocks release timelines.

examples.title: Daily orders ETL reconciliation
examples.summary: Flags checksum mismatch despite matching row counts.
examples.outputPreview: FAIL with checksum discrepancy on order_total

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic ETL reconciliation.

skills.name: Incident Timeline Builder
skills.shortDescription: Builds ordered incident timelines from multi-source evidence.
skills.longDescription: Normalizes and orders incident events from logs/alerts/changes into timeline artifacts for debugging and post-incident review.

outputs.name: incident_timeline
outputs.description: Chronological incident narrative.

outputs.name: incident_timeline_json

includedAssets.name: references/event-schema.md
includedAssets.description: Schema for timeline event input records.

includedAssets.name: references/timeline-quality-checks.md
includedAssets.description: Quality checks for complete, reviewable incident timelines.

failureModes: Timezone parsing errors can reorder events.
Incomplete event feeds reduce timeline trustworthiness.
Unlabeled events increase interpretation ambiguity.

examples.summary: Converts mixed alert and log records into ordered chronology.

skills.name: JSON Schema Enforcer
skills.shortDescription: Enforces strict JSON contracts for machine-consumed outputs.
skills.longDescription: Validates AI-generated JSON against explicit contracts with deterministic checks for required keys, type safety, allowed values, and forbidden fields.
skills.author: ARS Labs

inputs.name: contract_definition
inputs.description: Required fields, expected types, allowed values, and forbidden fields.

outputs.name: validated_output
outputs.description: JSON payload that passes all contract checks.

outputs.name: validation_report
outputs.description: Deterministic list of schema violations and fixes.

includedAssets.name: scripts/assert_contract.py
includedAssets.description: Validates JSON output against a lightweight contract spec.

includedAssets.name: references/contract-format.md
includedAssets.description: Defines the contract JSON format used by the validator.

includedAssets.name: references/edge-cases.md
includedAssets.description: Covers nullability, enum drift, and nested-structure edge cases.

includedAssets.name: references/repair-playbook.md
includedAssets.description: Defines deterministic repair ordering and retry policy.

idealUseCases: Automated compliance checks for JSON responses
failureModes: Semantically incorrect values can still pass if contract is incomplete.
Nested object constraints are limited in the lightweight checker.
Human review is still needed for business-rule correctness.

examples.title: Order status payload validation
examples.summary: Rejects unexpected enum values and missing required keys.

changelog.summary: Initial release with deterministic contract checks.

skills.name: Migration Dry-Run Planner

Rollback steps missing ownership or timing constraints.
Post-run verification coverage too narrow.

skills.name: Missing Tests PR Reviewer

includedAssets.description: Rules for documenting justified test-gap exemptions.

failureModes: Heuristic mapping may miss non-standard test organization.

outputs.name: risk_report
outputs.description: Severity score with evidence and rationale.

includedAssets.name: references/manual-override-policy.md
includedAssets.description: Governance policy for manual risk score overrides.

Diff statistics can underrepresent runtime behavior changes.

skills.name: Test-First Change Guardrail

includedAssets.name: references/flaky-test-triage.md
